verdict.label: Marginal
verdict.headline: Lagide Lunch
verdict.reason: There is a possible lunch window at Lagide, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

best.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for progression, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 111 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 79/100, and good wind at 16 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label progression, medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 111 kJ · 8 s period · good wind at 16 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for rare opportunity, medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 77 kJ, 8 s period, lully 28/100, and good wind at 14 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
ranked.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label rare opportunity, medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 77 kJ · 8 s period · good wind at 14 km/h · Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for rare opportunity, medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 66 kJ, 8 s period, lully 22/100, and good wind at 14 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a clean fun-sized window for check first, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 84 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 76/100, and good wind at 16 km/h.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Watch: Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
